scope: single-node local and CI infrastructure baseline; not HA

checks.proof: PostgreSQL and MinIO both reached healthy status.
Alembic upgrade/downgrade/re-upgrade completed on PostgreSQL; the seed-table path and an invalid transactional DDL probe left no partial schema.
MinIO accepted a unique-bucket upload/read/delete/delete-bucket round trip.
Architecture checker, Ruff, basedpyright, Biome, TypeScript, pytest, and Vitest completed without errors.

ci: GitHub Actions runs bootstrap, static checks, Compose startup, migration smoke, storage smoke, tests, gitleaks, and SBOM generation.
